# KudiTrack

> KudiTrack helps African small businesses track sales, inventory, expenses, savings, profit and cash flow from one mobile-first dashboard.

KudiTrack is a web app for daily business operations in Ghana and across Africa. Owners and staff record sales, manage inventory, log expenses and savings, and view live profit and cash-flow reports. Teams can invite staff with section-based permissions so each person only sees the work they are assigned.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point for KudiTrack.
- [Features](/features): Sales, stock, expenses, reports, staff permissions and dashboard tools.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Customer-style examples and trust signals for business owners.
- [Advertise](/advertise): Apply to advertise to KudiTrack business owners.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact the KudiTrack team or book a product demo.
- [Sign up](/sign-up): Create a new business account and start a 30-day free trial.
